name: @ont/adapter-da
description: ONT B4 adapter — the served-bytes DA transport (/da/{root}). Fetches the served-bytes payload from an untrusted DA source and structurally parses the candidate transport (version ‖ count ‖ leaves) into a ServedLeaf[]. It fetches + parses only; the B4-INDEX-DATASOURCE seam owns dedup / insert-only / non-empty / root reconstruction. Decides nothing.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/evidence && npm run build -w @ont/claim-path && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-indexer && vitest run
